items.title: Children and composition: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this React: Component-Based Browser Applications misconception? children is always an array and can be indexed safely.

items.title: Children and composition: verified implementation facet
items.prompt: Compose layout and behavior through children or focused slots rather than prop explosions. Build a bounded artifact demonstrating focused children composition slot; the locked browser verifier checks observable structure, behavior, or computed presentation.
